summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 4.7 MTF Entry Timing Layer - all 13 backend API tests passed with 100% success rate

HTF Analyze - bias, strength, permission analysis working
LTF Analyze - alignment, timing score, conflict detection working
MTF Modes - all 11 expected entry modes present

Mock Scenario LTF Conflict - returns SKIP_LTF_CONFLICT as expected
Mock Scenario Wait Confirmation - returns WAIT_LTF_CONFIRMATION as expected
Full MTF Decision - complete HTF+MTF+LTF integration working

MTF History - decision history logging working
